CareerFlora Expert Insight

The Railway NFR Apprentice programme is a great opportunity for candidates who want to work with Indian Railways. The application process is online, and candidates can apply from 20 July 2026 to 19 August 2026. The selection procedure and eligibility criteria are mentioned in the official notification.
The competition level for this programme is high, and candidates should prepare well to get selected. The best strategy is to read the notification carefully, check the eligibility criteria, and collect the required documents before filling the application form online.
